name: cw-core-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Blitzsicht customer website template system (@cw/core, @cw/manifest, cw CLI)

scripts.release:cw-core: git subtree split --prefix=packages/@cw/core -b release/cw-core && echo 'Now: git push origin release/cw-core && git tag release/cw-core/v<version> release/cw-core && git push --tags'
